text: **NMP#2809** — OPEN. Labels: priority:p2, category:decision, status:needs-adr, area:architecture. Proposes amending ADR-0075 to split "app surface" (unchanged: no Trellis vocabulary crosses UniFFI/web) from a new "diagnostic surface": a dev-build-only `nmp-devtools` crate exposing Trellis trace/audit data via an MCP server (`why_subscription_open`, `why_view_stale`, `what_closed_this_relay`, `list_scope_inventory`, `replay_session`) plus redacted trace export for bug reports. Explicitly excludes metrics/dashboards/log aggregation — receipts only. Names four upstream trellis prerequisites: #114 (serializable traces), #125 (audit retention toggle), #122 (typed resource keys), #126 (scope reclamation) — **all four now closed**. Sequenced after NMP #2808 (shadow→authority promotion), which is also now closed/merged (PR #2832, "Promote Trellis feed-session reconciliation to authority," merged today, 2026-07-03). Every stated prerequisite is done; #2809 is unblocked, just needs the ADR decision. No comments. [...] - **Phase C — agent-first prover (your CLI/REPL/TUI ask)**: the MCP server (`why_subscription_open`, `why_view_stale`, `what_closed_this_relay`, `list_scope_inventory`, `replay_session`) plus a headless CLI that drives a real Chirp session against real relays and also loads/scrubs exported capsules. Exit criterion baked into the epic: *an agent can answer "why is my feed empty?" from receipts alone.* This lands **before** the pane, so agents can iterate on the diagnostic itself. [...] **13. [Consider — Phase C] `replay_session(trace)` is in the Phase C MCP list but capsules don't exist until Phase E.** Either mark it as a Phase C stub excluded from acceptance, or move it to Phase E's deliverables.
